Algos
=====

Lower-level **variational** and **message-passing** routines for discrete POMDP models live in ``pymdp.algos`` (single Python module :mod:`pymdp.algos`). Public entry points include fixed-point iteration (FPI), marginal message passing (MMP), variational message passing (VMP), hybrid/padded variants used by optimized inference paths, and exact single-factor HMM smoothing helpers.

The Sphinx pages :doc:`fpi` and :doc:`mmp` document the main FPI and MMP callables. Other symbols remain available from the module docstring and source; see :doc:`inference` for how agents invoke this layer.

**Legacy:** NumPy implementations are under ``pymdp.legacy.algos`` (not covered by these autodoc pages).

.. seealso::

   * ``docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md`` — tests and examples mapped to inference
   * ``examples/inference_and_learning/inference_methods_comparison.ipynb`` — runnable gallery notebook
